title: PGIMER Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: PGIMER Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? PGIMER Advisory Limited in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PGIMER Advisory Limited:
PGIMER Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER Advisory Limited!
